summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Reports module with 14 report types across 5 categories. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with proper data display, filters, and export capabilities.

minor_issues.issue: Export endpoints return file content instead of JSON response
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior for file downloads - not actually an issue

passed_tests: All 15 backend report API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Reports page loads with 5 category sidebar
All 14 report types accessible and display data correctly
GRN-wise stock report shows 2 GRNs with proper data
Batch-wise stock report displays batch details
Bin-wise stock report shows 109 bins with utilization bars
Stock Aging report shows age buckets (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days)
Movement History report displays movement types with proper badges
Daily Summary report shows inward/outward counts
User Activity report accessible to Admin with 14 audit records
FIFO Compliance report shows 5 materials with compliant status
Date range filters working (start date, end date)
Material code filter working
Batch number filter working
Bin code filter working
Zone filter working with dropdown (Zone A, B, C)
Apply Filters button functional
Clear Filters button functional
Export Excel button clickable and functional
Export PDF button clickable and functional
Report category navigation working (Inventory, Movement, Compliance, Stock Analysis, Audit)
Permission-based access working (Admin can access User Activity)
Data tables display with proper headers and formatting
Status badges working (pending, completed, compliant)
Record counts displayed correctly (109 bins, 14 user activities, etc.)
Responsive UI with proper spacing and layout
